scripts.build:rrweb: pnpm --filter @glavin001/agentation build && pnpm --filter @glavin001/rrweb-source-record build && pnpm --filter @glavin001/rrweb-source-replay build && pnpm --filter @glavin001/rrweb-annotator build
scripts.publish:rrweb: pnpm --filter @glavin001/rrweb-source-record publish --access public && pnpm --filter @glavin001/rrweb-source-replay publish --access public && pnpm --filter @glavin001/rrweb-annotator publish --access public
scripts.publish:all: pnpm publish:agentation && pnpm publish:rrweb && pnpm publish:mcp
